title: Reindex when the embedding model changes
description: Re-embed and rebuild the index whenever the model or its version changes, since vectors are model-specific.
body: Use when upgrading or swapping the embedding model behind a vector store. Actions: treat the embedding model version as part of the index identity; on a change, re-embed the entire corpus with the new model, build a parallel index, run a recall and relevance comparison against the old index, and cut over only after the new index validates. Keep the old index until cutover completes. Verify that mixed old/new vectors never share one index. Validation signals include the parallel index passing the relevance comparison and no query spanning two model versions. Risk boundary: mixing vectors from different models in one index produces meaningless distances, so never partially re-embed in place; do a full rebuild and human-gate the cutover.
